project.name: skillget
project.summary: A mixed product/tooling repository for ClawHub intelligence gathering, AISA-focused catalog publishing, suspicious package optimization, and AI skill packaging experiments.
primaryGoals: Scrape ClawHub skills and plugins, detect probable AISA API usage, and publish a searchable static dashboard.
Repackage selected suspicious ClawHub skills into runtime-preserving optimized bundles with verification and downloadable release artifacts.
Maintain reusable AI skill assets and templates, including a standalone last30days research skill.

systems.name: ClawHub Intelligence Collection
systems.purpose: Collect metadata from ClawHub accounts, catalog pages, and item detail pages, then normalize it into a machine-readable catalog.
capabilities: GitHub skill to ClawHub skill conversion

systems.name: Static Dashboard
systems.purpose: Render the generated catalog, archive-level AISA API analysis, and optimized package index as a searchable static site.

systems.name: Suspicious Package Optimization Pipeline
systems.purpose: Download, trim, template, verify, package, and publish optimized bundles for suspicious ClawHub skills.
knownManualSteps: Original zip unpacking into artifacts/original-unpacked/ is not shown as a fully automated in-repo step.
OAuth approval and real write-path tests still require manual validation.

systems.name: Chinese Optimized Package Pipeline
systems.purpose: Clone optimized packages, swap in Chinese SKILL templates, then package and publish Chinese zip artifacts.
capabilities: copy filtered runtime files from optimized source packages

systems.name: Skill Assets And Reference Implementations
systems.purpose: Store reusable skill packages, templates, and a full-featured standalone skill example.
outputs: research brief or JSON output from last30days
skill package templates for optimized bundles

npmScripts.build: Scrape ClawHub, regenerate AISA API analysis data, and build the static site.
npmScripts.scrape: Run the ClawHub scraper and regenerate catalog.json.
npmScripts.analyze:aisa: Scan all public/downloads skill archives and regenerate public/data/aisa-api-analysis.json.
npmScripts.pipeline:aisa-analysis: Refresh ClawHub and GitHub skill archives, rebuild AISA analysis data, then build the static site.
npmScripts.build:source-optimized: Build English optimized package directories from original-unpacked sources.
npmScripts.build:source-optimized-zh: Build Chinese optimized package directories from source-optimized packages.
npmScripts.package:source-optimized: Zip English optimized packages into release artifacts.
npmScripts.package:source-optimized-zh: Zip Chinese optimized packages into release artifacts.
npmScripts.verify:source-optimized: Run static checks for optimized packages.
npmScripts.live-test:source-optimized: Run AISA-backed smoke tests for optimized packages.
npmScripts.publish:optimized-downloads: Publish optimized package metadata and copy zips into public downloads.
npmScripts.download:suspicious-zips: Download suspicious skill zips referenced by catalog.json.
npmScripts.refresh:clawhub-owner-seeds: Use Playwright-rendered owner pages to refresh clawhub-hash-format-urls.csv for tracked accounts.
npmScripts.download:clawhub-account-skills: Refresh rendered owner seeds when available, scrape ClawHub, then download all skills for tracked accounts into public/downloads/clawHub/, trying the CN mirror first and falling back to the ClawHub-origin URL.
npmScripts.download:github-account-skills: Treat catalog owners as GitHub usernames, scan public repos for SKILL.md, and package discovered skill directories into public/downloads/github/.

importantData.role: Primary normalized dataset consumed by the dashboard and downstream packaging flows.
Archive-level interface and skill analysis dataset used by the GitHub Pages dashboard.
Published index of optimized bundles shown in the dashboard.
Static verification report for optimized packages.
Live smoke test report for optimized packages.

workflowDocs.role: Operational spec for archive refresh, AISA endpoint analysis, validation, and acceptance.

automation.role: GitHub Pages deployment workflow; runs pipeline:aisa-analysis, refreshes downloads and AISA analysis during CI, retries transient failures, prevents overlapping runs, and uploads analysis artifacts for troubleshooting.

keyDirectories.role: Operational scripts for scraping, interface analysis, building, verifying, packaging, and publishing.
Published JSON data consumed by the frontend.
Template SKILL.md sources for optimized packaging.

assumptionsAndRisks: AISA detection in the scraper is heuristic, not authoritative.
Global ClawHub catalog traversal is less reliable than account-page discovery.
Some packaging and runtime acceptance steps remain manual.
Repository contains generated assets, historical CSVs, and active work-in-progress changes.
